name: Oracle → Snowflake Data Migration Pipeline
desc: Built end-to-end ETL pipeline for migrating enterprise data using AWS DMS and S3.
architecture: Oracle → DMS → S3 → Snowflake → Redshift Validation

name: Azure Data Engineering Pipeline
desc: Designed scalable ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Databricks to process and transform large datasets.
impact: Processed large-scale data with optimized transformations and improved pipeline efficiency

name: Real-Time Data Ingestion using Snowpipe
desc: Implemented real-time data ingestion pipeline using Snowpipe with automated file detection and continuous data loading.
impact: Enabled near real-time data availability with automated ingestion workflows

name: Campaign Data Processing System
desc: Built and supported data pipelines for campaign platforms handling audience targeting and marketing analytics.
impact: Processed campaign data for large-scale retail systems ensuring accurate targeting and execution
architecture: Source → ADF → Databricks → Snowflake → Campaign Platforms

name: LinkCampus - A Social Platform
desc: LinkCampus is an innovative social platform designed exclusively for college students. It leverages the power of the MERN stack to create a robust and dynamic environment with a real-time chat functionality.

name: DisKas - Forum Platform
desc: DisKas is an online forum platform designed for programmers to ask questions and seek answers related to programming languages and development, built using a combination of PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript

name: NetFlix Clone
desc: NetFlix clone built using Next.js, Magic Authentication, Hasura Database & GraphQL.

name: NewPortal
desc: NewsPortal built on the Laravel framework. The platform provides real-time updates on the latest news across a wide range of categories.
